code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  mut remaining = nums
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let total = if k < remaining.len()
    k
  else
    remaining.len()
  end
  mut count = 0
  while count < total
    let m = match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, m)
    let idx = match list.index_of(remaining, m)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < remaining.len()
      if j == idx
        j = j + 1
      else
        let v = match remaining.get(j)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        j = j + 1
      end
    end
    remaining = new_rem
    count = count + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut p = 0
  while p < result.len()
    let v = match result.get(p)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if p == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    p = p + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
